title: Trump to speak at NABJ Convention
shortDescription: Donald Trump will speak at the National Association of Black Journalists Convention in Chicago to the disapproval of some attendees.

title: No, this clip doesn't show bullet hitting Trump's ear | Fact check
shortDescription: The flipped footage in the post shows Trump's left ear, which didn't appear injured in the attempt on his life. It was his right ear that was hurt.

title: New details revealed on Trump assassination attempt: Takeaways from hearing
shortDescription: New details on the Trump assassination attempt investigation were revealed Tuesday, including that local law enforcement photographed the shooter.

title: 'Horrific:' Donald Trump's nephew opens up about his uncle
shortDescription: Fred Trump III will not be voting for his uncle Donald. "He's done really horrific things to me," Trump told ABC. He alleges use of racial slur.

title: Black journalists org. will host Q&A with Trump in Chicago Wednesday
shortDescription: The National Association of Black Journalists will host a panel with Donald Trump Wednesday. Some raised concerns about his record with Black voters.

title: Secret Service and FBI leaders at US Senate
shortDescription: Ronald L. Rowe, Jr, Acting Director of the U.S. Secret Service and Paul Abbate, FBI Deputy Director testify at a U.S. Senate hearing on the attempted assassination of former President Donald Trump

title: Senate passes online safety bills but future uncertain in House
shortDescription: The bills would give parents more control over what their kids see on social media.

title: Trump defends running mate JD Vance's 'childless cat ladies' comment
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump defended running mate JD Vance's 'childless cat ladies' comment during an interview on Fox News on Monday.

title: Trump campaign to focus on battleground state Arizona
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump's campaign is giving some extra attention to battleground Arizona.

title: Trump shooter visited rally site July 7, anti-immigrant posts found
shortDescription: Secret Service and FBI officials testified Tuesday before two Senate committees on the assassination attempt of Donald Trump. Follow along for live updates.

title: Who is running for Wyoming state senate? Crucial races to watch.
shortDescription: As Wyoming's Republicans fracture along national lines, a look at competitive state senate races.

title: Biden calls for sweeping Supreme Court changes | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Sheriff in charge of the deputy who killed Sonya Massey declines to resign, while asking for forgiveness. More stories on The Excerpt.

title: Donald Trump stumps for Kari Lake on Arizona primary eve
shortDescription: Running through his own political agenda, Trump cited Lake as a key ally as Arizona Republicans pick a Senate nominee.

title: 2 spectators critically injured at Trump rally released from hospital
shortDescription: James Copenhaver, 74, and David Dutch, 57, were transported to Allegheny General Hospital after being critically wounded during the July 13 rally.

title: Granholm talks Biden 2024 exit, electric vehicles: 4 takeaways
shortDescription: Energy Secretary and former Michigan Gov. Jennifer Granholm discussed President Joe Biden's 2024 exit, electric vehicles and more during an interview.

title: Stricter voter ID laws disenfranchise thousands in swing states
shortDescription: Ohio now has the strictest voter ID law in the U.S., preventing thousands from voting. Other states with new ID laws include Florida and Georgia.

title: Republican Arizona mayor endorses Kamala Harris over Donald Trump
shortDescription: John Giles, mayor of Mesa, Arizona, endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris over his party's nominee on Monday, saying she's 'competent, just and fair'
